name: date-picker-with-range

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## date-picker-with-range
**Type:** registry:example
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** date-fns

visual_summary: A date-picker-with-range component allows users to select a date range, typically presented as two date picker fields side-by-side. This component is commonly used in applications that require booking, scheduling, or travel information. Developers use it when a user needs to select a specific start and end date.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready date picker component with the following characteristics:

Name: date-picker-with-range
Description: A date-picker-with-range component allows users to select a date range, typically presented as two date picker fields side-by-side. This component is commonly used in applications that require booking, scheduling, or travel information. Developers use it when a user needs to select a specific start and end date.
Style: e.g. material design, material you
Interactions: e.g. animated, hover, clickable
Tags: date picker, range selection, booking, scheduling

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
